$schema: Core Design Model — technology-independent intermediate representation (IR)
description: All generic design agents read/write this model. Technology Adapter maps IR → stack-specific artifacts.
rules: No technology names in IR (no Controller, Screen, Flow, @Service)
Use generic layer assignments: presentation, business, data, integration, configuration
Business rules use BR-ID and business language only
Legacy migration stores source excerpt language in legacyLogicMigration[].sourceLanguage — not Java
API operations are resource-oriented: method, path, operationId, request, response, errors
